question: Send a pay or deduction query by text
answer: I'll collect your details and open your messaging app with a pre‑filled text to our pay & deductions team. Just tap this topic or type pay query or deduction query to get started.

question: Get directions to my closest depot
answer: Ask closest depot and I'll guide you (you can use GPS or select a city).

question: What are your opening times?
answer: We're open Monday–Friday, 8:30–17:00 (UK time). We're closed on weekends and bank holidays.
followUps: Are you open on bank holidays?

question: Are you open on bank holidays?
answer: No — we are not open on bank holidays.

question: Is anyone available now?
answer: Ask is anyone available to check if we're open right now (UK time).

question: How can I contact support?
answer: You can reach Welfare directly on 02087583060 — please hold the line when prompted.

question: Where are you located?
answer: We're based in Nuneaton, UK. Visits are by appointment only.
followUps: Get directions to my closest depot

question: Pay / Payroll query
answer: For pay queries you can send a text to our team — just type pay query and I'll guide you through it. Alternatively call 02037583060 and select option 1.
followUps: Send a pay or deduction query by text

question: Deductions query
answer: For deduction queries you can send a text to our team — just type deduction query and I'll guide you through it. Alternatively call 02037583060 and select option 1.
followUps: Send a pay or deduction query by text

question: Work Allocation query
answer: Has this been raised with your Field and Area Manager?
followUps: Work allocation — yes raised with manager

question: Work allocation — yes raised with manager
answer: Please contact Welfare directly on 02087583060 and hold the line.

question: Work allocation — not yet raised
answer: Please raise this to your Field and Area Manager. If concerns remain after this step, please contact Welfare directly on 02087583060 and hold the line.

question: Contract Change query
answer: For any contract change queries, please raise this to your Area Manager.

question: Street Works query
answer: For any Street Work queries please contact Street.Works@kelly.co.uk.

question: Smart Awards query
answer: For any Smart Award queries please contact smartawards@kelly.co.uk.

question: ID Cards
answer: If you have lost, not received, or your ID card has expired, please contact nuneaton.admin@kelly.co.uk.

question: Accident or injury report
